Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat

Class ChatItem

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat.ChatItem
public class ChatItem extends Object
YouTube live chat message model.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void

    Ban chat author permanently from the channel (+ delete chat).

    Delete this chat.

    Get text color of background in int.

    Get elapsed time from starting viewing this paid message in seconds.

    Returns the ticker end background color for ticker paid messages.

    Get full duration of paid message viewing in seconds.

    Get header background color in int.

    Get header color in int.

    Get id.

    Get member badge icon url.

    Get message in String

    Get list of extended messages.
    String

    Get purchase amount of this paid message

    Get sticker icon url.

    Get timestamp of this item.

    Ban chat author for 300 seconds (+ delete chat).

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public ChatItemType getType()
      Get type of this item.
      Returns:
      Type of this item

    • getAuthorName

      public String getAuthorName()
      Get author name.
      Returns:
      Author name

    • getAuthorChannelID

      public String getAuthorChannelID()
      Get author's channel id.
      Returns:
      Author's channel id

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Get message in String
      Returns:
      Message

    • getMessageExtended

      public List<Object> getMessageExtended()
      Get list of extended messages. This list contains Text or Emoji.
      Returns:
      List of extended messages

    • getAuthorIconURL

      public String getAuthorIconURL()
      Get author's icon url.
      Returns:
      Author's icon url

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Get id.
      Returns:
      Id

    • getTimestamp

      public long getTimestamp()
      Get timestamp of this item.
      Returns:
      Timestamp in UNIX time

    • getAuthorType

      public List<AuthorType> getAuthorType()
      Get author types in List.
      Returns:
      List of AuthorType

    • isAuthorVerified

      public boolean isAuthorVerified()
      Is this message's author verified?
      Returns:
      If this message's author is verified, returns true.

    • isAuthorOwner

      public boolean isAuthorOwner()
      Is this message's author owner?
      Returns:
      If this message's author is owner, returns true.

    • isAuthorModerator

      public boolean isAuthorModerator()
      Is this message's author moderator?
      Returns:
      If this message's author is moderator, returns true.

    • isAuthorMember

      public boolean isAuthorMember()
      Is this message's author member?
      Returns:
      If this message's author is member, returns true.

    • getMemberBadgeIconURL

      public String getMemberBadgeIconURL()
      Get member badge icon url. You can use if isAuthorMember() == true
      Returns:
      Member badge icon url

    • getBodyBackgroundColor

      public int getBodyBackgroundColor()
      Get background color of body in int.
      Returns:
      Color in int

    • getBodyTextColor

      public int getBodyTextColor()
      Get text color of background in int.
      Returns:
      Color in int

    • getHeaderBackgroundColor

      public int getHeaderBackgroundColor()
      Get header background color in int.
      Returns:
      Color in int

    • getHeaderTextColor

      public int getHeaderTextColor()
      Get header color in int.
      Returns:
      Color in int

    • getPurchaseAmount

      public String getPurchaseAmount()
      Get purchase amount of this paid message
      Returns:
      Amount of money(example ￥100)

    • getAuthorNameTextColor

      public int getAuthorNameTextColor()
      Get text color of drawing author name in int.
      Returns:
      Color in int

    • getEndBackgroundColor

      public int getEndBackgroundColor()
      Returns the ticker end background color for ticker paid messages.
      Returns:
      color value as integer

    • getDurationSec

      public int getDurationSec()
      Get elapsed time from starting viewing this paid message in seconds. You can use if getType() == PAID_MESSAGE
      Returns:
      Elapsed time from starting viewing this paid message in seconds

    • getFullDurationSec

      public int getFullDurationSec()
      Get full duration of paid message viewing in seconds. You can use if getType() == PAID_MESSAGE
      Returns:
      Full duration of paid message viewing in seconds

    • getStickerIconURL

      public String getStickerIconURL()
      Get sticker icon url. You can use if getType() == PAID_STICKER
      Returns:
      Sticker icon url

    • getBackgroundColor

      public int getBackgroundColor()
      Get background color in int. You can use if getType() == PAID_STICKER
      Returns:
      Background color in int

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • delete

      public void delete() throws IOException
      Delete this chat. You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method. User must be either author of chat, moderator or owner.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set or permission denied error

    • timeoutAuthor

      public void timeoutAuthor() throws IOException
      Ban chat author for 300 seconds (+ delete chat). You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method. User must be either moderator or owner.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set or permission denied error

    • banAuthor

      public void banAuthor() throws IOException
      Ban chat author permanently from the channel (+ delete chat). You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method. User must be either moderator or owner.
      **Use with cautions!!** It is recommended to store these banned ChatItem so you can unban later.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set or permission denied error

    • unbanAuthor

      public void unbanAuthor() throws IOException
      Unban chat author who was permanently banned from the channel (deleted chat won't be recovered). You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method. User must be either moderator or owner.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set or permission denied error

    • pinAsBanner

      public void pinAsBanner() throws IOException
      Pin this chat as banner. You need to set user data using setUserData() before calling this method. User must be either moderator or owner.
      Throws:
      IOException - Http request error
      IllegalStateException - The IDs are not set or permission denied error
